message:
fix: surface source errors in gt ready, remove dead stopCh (gt-y3bfi, gt-btpbz)

- gt ready now warns when some sources fail to load and returns an error
  when all sources fail, so users know results may be incomplete
- Remove unused stopCh channel from Engineer struct (graceful shutdown
  already handled via context.Context)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
